candidate.description: FOR-388 source-local blue contribution plus oriented coverage side, evaluated across the full M60 F16 scene.
candidate.selectionMethod: (round-round && transparentSourceColorFamily == blue-dominant-source && orientedCoverageSide in {west-terminal,north-west-solid}) || (butt-bevel && transparentSourceColorFamily == blue-dominant-source && orientedCoverageSide == north-east-solid && coverageAlphaByte >= 160)

selectedPixelSamples.membershipReason: The current pixel is already reference-equivalent, but the probe introduces residual while diagnostic coverage/source alpha are non-zero; this points to coverage/composition damage rather than source-colour rescue.

classificationReason: The candidate selects at least one full-scene pixel that the probe would regress, or its selected-pixel simulation increases full-scene residual.
nextMove: Do not wire the predicate. Capture narrower renderer-owned metadata before another correction attempt.
